titleStmt.title: SII 38.118: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 118. (A.R. No. 118 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Begins with the mēykīrtti of the king Pugaḻ-mādu viḷaṅga.

It registers a gift of ninety sheep by Seyyāṉ Oṟṟikoṇḍāṉ, son of Oṟṟi Seyyān alias Sōḻavallaba Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Iḷanagar in Puṟaṅgarambai-nāḍu in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam, for burning a perpetual lamp to the god at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻal-nāḍu in Rājēndrachōḻavaḷanāḍu (a sub-division of) Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam.

Three shepherds of the locality called Tribhuvanasundara-chēri, Punai Subrahmaṇṇiyan alias Nāṟpatteṇṇāyirakkōṉ, Niṉnañjiraṉ Dōṇan alias Kārāṇai Viṭaṅkakōṉ, Iniyāṉ Oṟṟikoṇḍān alias Dēvar Selvakkōṉ received the above gift agreed to measure out ninety nāḻi of oil per year at the rate of an uḻakku every day by the measure Arumoḻidēvan at the hands of the temple servants in the temple treasury at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr.
The measure Arumoḻidēvan was named after the original name of the Chōḷa ruler, Rājarāja I.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka ja
yamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava
malar makaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ci
ṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi minavar nilai
keṭa villavar kulaitara ye
nai maṉnavari riyalūṟṟiḻi ta
rat tikkanaittun=tanc cakkara na
ṭātti virasiṁhāsanat
tu Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu
m viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakesari
panmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅ
ka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattu muṉṟāvatu co
ḻamaṇṭalattu puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu Iḷanakar
nakaruṭaiyāṉ Oṟṟiceyyānāna coḻavallapa muventa
veḷāṉ makaṉ ceyyāṉ Oṟṟikoṇṭāṉ jayaṅkoṇ
ṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Irājentracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu puḻalnāṭṭu
t tiruvoṟṟiyūr tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyāṟku tirunan=tā viḷakku Oṉ
ṟu Ācantra kālamum ErimpataṟkuRead as erippataṟkuvaitta cāvāmuvāpperāṭu
toṇṇūṟu . toṇṇūṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭom tiruvo
ṟṟiyūr tiripuvanacun=taracceri maṉṟāṭi puntai cuppiramaṇṇiyanā
na nāṟpatteṇṇāyirakkoṉum niṉnañciraṉ toṇanāna kāraṇai
viṭaṅkakkoṉum Iniyāṉ Oṟṟikoṇṭānāna tevar celvakkoṉu
m Uḷḷiṭṭa tiripuvanacun=taracceri maṉṟāṭikaḷ Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūru
ṭaiyār paṇṭārattey koṇṭu ceṉṟu tevarkaṉmikaḷ vacam nāḷ O
ṉṟukku Arumoḻitevanāl Uḻakkāka Āṇṭuvarai Aḷakka kaṭa
va ney toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻi toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻiyum munniṉṟo
m Aḷakka kaṭavomānom .
Digital edition of SII 38.118 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
